blended.narrative: Okemo is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 51°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
